scripts.preinstall: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const ua=process.env.npm_config_user_agent||''; try{fs.rmSync('package-lock.json',{force:true}); fs.rmSync('yarn.lock',{force:true});}catch{} if(!ua.startsWith('pnpm/')){console.error('Use pnpm instead'); process.exit(1); }"
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
